name: JobProcessingWorkflow:ENTITY_MODEL_VAR:ENTITY_VERSION_VAR:CHAT_ID_VAR
description: A workflow to process a job by setting the start time and fetching the result via an external service.

transitions.name: start_processing
transitions.description: Set the processing start time and validate query existence.
transitions.end_state_description: Processing has started and query has been checked

transitions.name: fetch_result
transitions.description: Fetch the result from the external service based on the query.
transitions.start_state_description: State after processing has started and query exists
transitions.end_state_description: Result successfully fetched and updated in the entity

externalized_processors.name: process_fetch_result
externalized_processors.description: Performs the asynchronous HTTP request and updates the entity with the retrieved result.
